I am Erica. She is my colleague.
I have a family. She has a routine.
I always start work at eight o clock.
I have some coffee. I do not have any tea.
Hi, Erica! How is your family?
My family is great! We live in a quiet neighborhood. And you?
I am fine. My routine is busy. I am a colleague in a big office.
Me too! I always start at eight o clock. I write a report every week.
Nice! Do you have any time for a meal today?
Yes! At noon I have lunch, my favorite meal. Let us eat together.
Perfect. But at three o clock I have an appointment with my manager.
No problem. Lunch is at twelve. See you then, David!
I am Erica. I work at Biodelta.
I live with my family in a quiet neighborhood.
I write a report with my colleague.
My favorite meal is lunch.

Hi, my name is Carla. Let me tell you about my life. I live with my family in a quiet neighborhood. Every day I have the same routine. I wake up at half past six and I drink some coffee. I start work at eight o'clock. I work in a busy office with a good colleague. We write a report every week. At lunch, I always eat a big meal with some fruit and some water. I have an appointment with my doctor on Friday. I am a happy and busy person.

Hello, I am Bruno. I want to tell you about my normal day. I live in a small neighborhood with my family. My routine is simple. I usually get up at seven o'clock and I am very hungry, so I eat some bread. I go to the office at nine o'clock. My colleague and I answer emails and finish a report. I never drink any coffee in the afternoon. At one o'clock I have my favorite meal, lunch. Tonight I have an appointment with a friend. I like my quiet life.

First, in the morning Erica wakes up and drinks some coffee. Second, she goes to the office. Third, she meets her colleague and they finish a report. Fourth, at noon she has a big meal. Fifth, in the evening she has an appointment with her family.
